pattern_report: 18-24 audiences drive a 67% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 24% lower CVR and 49% lower CPA across 2 campaigns.
18-25 audiences drive a 53% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 22% lower CVR and 47% lower CPA across 4 campaigns.
21-28 audiences drive a 42% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 22% lower CVR and 46% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
Reel creatives deliver a 67% stronger performance score, 15% lower CVR, and 55% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
Ugc_Video creatives deliver a 67% stronger performance score, 32% lower CVR, and 43% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
Video creatives deliver a 53% stronger performance score, 22% lower CVR, and 47% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 4 campaigns.
cmp_005_linkedin_exec_report is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 105.56 on 7600.00 spend while only converting at 9.5%.
cmp_002_google_search_saas_demo is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 67.71 on 6500.00 spend while only converting at 4.2%.
TikTok campaigns average 3.5% CTR and 3.3% CVR, driving a 67% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Meta campaigns average 3.2% CTR and 4.4% CVR, driving a 26% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Google Ads campaigns average 2.6% CTR and 4.2% CVR, driving a 59% weaker score than the portfolio average.
Meta CTR is trending up by 0.13% per campaign over the last 4 runs.
The scale winners cluster contains 2 campaigns with 3.8% average CVR and 21.78 CPA.
The mixed cluster contains 3 campaigns with 4.4% average CVR and 27.05 CPA.
The at risk cluster contains 2 campaigns with 6.8% average CVR and 86.63 CPA.
